FAMILY SONG

"Call: Do you love this family? Responds: I love this family of God.2x
Call: So tell me how tightly?
Responds: So tightly knitted into one, They have taken me into the house I am so glad to be, Am proud of this great family.
Call and Responds: FCS together we will grow.2x Call and responds: Don': you know you means so much to me. 2x
Call and Responds: I need you to build this family.2x
Call and Responds: You need me to build this family. 2x
Call and Responds: Higher and higher we will grow.2x
Together: we are heirs.............Of the father, we are joint heirs with the son, we are children of the kingdom, we are family we are one."
